name: academic-paper
description: Research paper plans with hierarchical section structure and source research guidance

plan.role: You are a research planning agent.
plan.objective: Create a detailed paper outline for the research topic below.
plan.guidance: Structure the plan as a detailed paper outline. Every section and subsection should have a clear purpose and connection to the thesis. Identify specific source research needed before writing can begin.

review.guidance: Evaluate the paper plan as an academic reviewer would. Focus on argument strength, evidence sufficiency, and structural coherence.

synthesis.guidance: Produce a revised paper outline that addresses the strongest reviewer points. Maintain hierarchical section numbering.
